name: image-template-anime-martial-arts-battle-illustration
title: Anime Martial Arts Battle Illustration

title_i18n.ja: アニメ武術バトルイラスト
title_i18n.fr: Illustration de combat d'arts martiaux anime
title_i18n.es: Ilustración de batalla de artes marciales anime
title_i18n.pt-BR: Ilustração de batalha de artes marciais anime
title_i18n.it: Illustrazione di combattimento di arti marziali anime
title_i18n.vi: Minh họa trận chiến võ thuật anime
title_i18n.id: Ilustrasi pertarungan seni bela diri anime
title_i18n.ar: رسم توضيحي لمعركة فنون قتالية أنمي

description: Generates a dynamic, high-impact anime illustration of two female characters fighting in a traditional dojo with elemental energy effects.

description_i18n.zh-CN: 生成动态高冲击力的动漫插画，描绘两位女性角色在传统道场中使用元素能量特效进行战斗。
description_i18n.zh-TW: 生成動態高衝擊力的動漫插畫，描繪兩位女性角色在傳統道場中使用元素能量特效進行戰鬥。
description_i18n.ja: 伝統的な道場で元素エネルギーエフェクトを伴い戦う2人の女性キャラクターを描いた、ダイナミックで迫力あるアニメイラストを生成します。
description_i18n.ko: 전통 도장에서 원소 에너지 효과를 사용하여 싸우는 두 여성 캐릭터의 역동적이고 임팩트 있는 애니메이션 일러스트를 생성합니다.
description_i18n.de: Erstellt eine dynamische, eindrucksvolle Anime-Illustration von zwei kämpfenden weiblichen Charakteren in einem traditionellen Dojo mit elementaren Energieeffekten.
description_i18n.fr: Génère une illustration anime dynamique et percutante de deux personnages féminins se battant dans un dojo traditionnel avec des effets d'énergie élémentaire.
description_i18n.ru: Создает динамичную, эффектную аниме-иллюстрацию двух женских персонажей, сражающихся в традиционном додзё с эффектами элементальной энергии.
description_i18n.es: Genera una ilustración anime dinámica y de alto impacto de dos personajes femeninos luchando en un dojo tradicional con efectos de energía elemental.
description_i18n.pt-BR: Gera uma ilustração anime dinâmica e de alto impacto de duas personagens femininas lutando em um dojo tradicional com efeitos de energia elemental.
description_i18n.it: Genera un'illustrazione anime dinamica e d'impatto di due personaggi femminili che combattono in un dojo tradizionale con effetti di energia elementale.
description_i18n.vi: Tạo minh họa anime năng động, ấn tượng về hai nhân vật nữ chiến đấu trong võ đường truyền thống với hiệu ứng năng lượng nguyên tố.
description_i18n.pl: Generuje dynamiczną, efektowną ilustrację anime przedstawiającą dwie walczące postacie kobiece w tradycyjnym dojo z efektami energii żywiołów.
description_i18n.id: Menghasilkan ilustrasi anime yang dinamis dan berdampak tinggi dari dua karakter wanita bertarung di dojo tradisional dengan efek energi elemental.
description_i18n.nl: Genereert een dynamische, impactvolle anime-illustratie van twee vrouwelijke personages die vechten in een traditionele dojo met elementaire energie-effecten.
description_i18n.ar: ينشئ رسمًا توضيحيًا أنمي ديناميكيًا وعالي التأثير لشخصيتين أنثويتين تتقاتلان في دوجو تقليدي مع تأثيرات طاقة عنصرية.
description_i18n.tr: Geleneksel bir dojo'da element enerji efektleriyle dövüşen iki kadın karakterin dinamik, yüksek etkili anime illüstrasyonunu oluşturur.
description_i18n.uk: Генерує динамічну, вражаючу аніме-ілюстрацію двох жіночих персонажів, що борються в традиційному додзьо з ефектами елементальної енергії.
description_i18n.en: Generates a dynamic, high-impact anime illustration of two female characters fighting in a traditional dojo with elemental energy effects.

query.en: An anime-style illustration of a {argument name="action type" default="high-impact martial arts battle"} between two young female fighters in a {argument name="setting" default="traditional wooden martial arts dojo"}. In the foreground, a girl with black hair in a high bun wears a {argument name="character 1 color theme" default="red and white"} Chinese-style martial arts outfit with baggy pants. She is in a dynamic, low, forward-thrusting stance, surrounded by swirling red energy and water splashes. In the background to the right, a girl with light purple hair in twin buns wears a {argument name="character 2 color theme" default="green and purple"} Chinese dress with gold embroidery and black tights. She is leaping through the air in a flying kick pose, surrounded by swirling blue energy. The wooden floorboards are splintering from the intense impact, with debris and dust flying through the air. Above them hangs a weathered wooden sign with the text "{argument name="sign text" default="武術会"}". The scene features dramatic lighting, a low-angle dynamic perspective, and intense action effects.

In the foreground, a girl with black hair in a high bun wears a {argument name="character 1 color theme" default="red and white"} Chinese-style martial arts outfit with baggy pants. She is in a dynamic, low, forward-thrusting stance, surrounded by swirling red energy and water splashes. In the background to the right, a girl with light purple hair in twin buns wears a {argument name="character 2 color theme" default="green and purple"} Chinese dress with gold embroidery and black tights. She is leaping through the air in a flying kick pose, surrounded by swirling blue energy. The wooden floorboards are splintering from the intense impact, with debris and dust flying through the air. Above them hangs a weathered wooden sign with the text "{argument name="sign text" default="武術会"}". The scene features dramatic lighting, a low-angle dynamic perspective, and intense action effects.
